about.page_title: Om — Pulser · Holdet der bygger det
about.meta_desc: Pulser bygger AI-styresystemet til moderne fitness. Grundlagt af en GTM-først salgsveteran og en 30-årig AI- og vidensstyringsspecialist.
about.fitness_software_is_broken_were_re: Fitnesssoftware er ødelagt. Vi genopbygger det.
about.pulser_is_the_operating_system_for: Pulser is the operating system for that problem. One platform for operators. One AI træner for medlemmer. A unified data layer that lets the two finally speak.
about.discovery_calls_lois_and_paid_pilo: Discovery-samtaler, LOI'er og betalte piloter inden vi leverer funktioner. Pull, ikke push.
about.peerreviewed_biomechanics_validati: Fagfællebedømt biomekanikvalidering, EHDS-compliance, Horizon Europe-tilpasning. Langsommere, sværere, forsvarligt.
about.the_gym_only_wins_if_the_member_wi: The fitnesscenter only wins if the medlem wins. Every feature has to prove both sides benefit.
about.were_not_hiring_yet_were_building_: We're not hiring yet — we're building and validating with the first operators, trænere and medlemmer. If that sounds like you, we'd love to hear from you.
about.managed_b2b_saas_partnerships_acro: • Styret B2B SaaS-partnerskaber på tværs af EU-markeder
about.gtmfirst_founder_sells_before_buil: • GTM-først stifter: sælger før han bygger
about.30_years_in_knowledge_management_t: • 30+ års erfaring inden for vidensstyring, TRIZ, AI
about.9_years_at_epam_systems_llmbased_t: • 9 år hos EPAM Systems — LLM-baserede værktøjer
about.founded_zorka_lab_seka_ai_ontology: • Grundlagde Zorka Lab + SEKA AI (ontologibaseret AI)
ai_coach.page_title: AI Coach — Pulser · Den forsvarlige voldgrav
ai_coach.meta_desc: Realtids formanalyse via smartphonekamera. Wearable-integration. Forebyggende sundhedsmonitorering. EHDS-kompatibel og fagfællebedømt.
ai_coach.a_coach_that_sees_every_rep_and: A træner that sees every rep. And every warning sign.
ai_coach.a_proprietary_movement_interpre: Et proprietært bevægelsesfortolkningslag, ikke en wrapper.
ai_coach.the_feature_your_competitors_ca: Funktionen dine konkurrenter ikke kan eftermontere.
ai_coach.most_ai_fitness_apps_are_a_thin: De fleste "AI fitness"-apps er en tynd brugerflade oven på en andens API. AI Coach i Pulser.One er bygget på vores eget proprietære bevægelsesfortolkningslag — positionsestimering, biomekanisk modellering, skaderisikoscoring, periodisering. Den kører on-device hvor den kan, i skyen hvor den skal skalere.
ai_coach.that_means_three_things_privacy: Det betyder tre ting: privacy-first by design, en voldgrav der forstærkes med hver session trænet på platformen, og funktioner som en SaaS CRM ikke kan eftermontere i en sprint.
ai_coach.not_openai_not_a_thirdparty_api: Ikke OpenAI. Ikke en tredjeparts-API. Bevægelses-, risiko- og plangenerering kører på vores egen stack.
ai_coach.pose_estimation_and_form_scorin: Positionsestimering og formscoring kører lokalt på din telefon. Lav latens, høj privatlivsbeskyttelse.
ai_coach.injuryrisk_and_programming_mode: Skaderisiko- og programmeringsmodeller spores tilbage til publiceret biomekanisk forskning.
ai_coach.every_session_across_pulserone_: Hver session på tværs af Pulser.One, Pulser.Gym og Pulser.Coach skærper modellen.
ai_coach.mediapipebased_pose_estimation_: MediaPipe-based pose estimation runs on the medlem's smartphone. Frame-by-frame form feedback on squat, deadlift, bench — no special hardware required.
ai_coach.apple_watch_garmin_whoop_oura_f: Apple Watch, Garmin, Whoop, Oura feed continuous cardiovascular and recovery signals. The træner knows when to push and when to pull back.
ai_coach.members_can_share_injuries_chro: Medlemmer kan dele skader, kroniske lidelser, medicin. Planer skræddersyes omkring reel medicinsk kontekst — med fuld brugerkontrol og EHDS-compliance.
ai_coach.point_your_phone_the_coach_scor: Point your phone. The træner scores depth, bar path, hip drive, knee tracking. Haptic or audio cues tell you what to fix — before you load another plate.
ai_coach.weekly_programming_that_adapts_: Ugentlig programmering der tilpasser sig det der faktisk skete: missede sessioner, dårlig restitution, hårde hverdage. Ikke en statisk PDF.
ai_coach.combined_signals_flag_elevated_: Combined signals flag elevated injury risk, signs of overtraining, cardiovascular anomalies. Members are nudged — fitnesscenters get context.
ai_coach.for_gym_operators_a_daily_list_: For fitnesscenter operators: a daily list of medlemmer at churn risk, ranked — with the reason why and the suggested intervention.
ai_coach.cto_andrei_kuryan_publishes_at_: CTO Andrei Kuryan publishes at Springer (AI-Powered Innovation, 2025). We publish biomechanics validation studies so fitnesscenters can sell medlemmer on clinically proven AI.
ai_coach.eu_health_data_space_regulation: EU Health Data Space-forordningen (2025/327) træder i kraft i faser fra 2026. Pulser er arkitektonisk EHDS-klar fra dag ét — ikke eftermonteret.
ai_coach.members_choose_what_to_share_wi: Medlemmer vælger hvad de vil dele, med hvem og hvor længe. Dataportabilitet og retten til sletning er indbygget i produktet, ikke påboltet.
ai_coach.published_validation_unlocks_ho: Publiceret validering åbner for Horizon Europe- og EHDS-tilskud — ikke-udvandende finansiering som kun videnskabsbaserede platforme kan få adgang til.
ai_coach.the_ai_coach_ships_with_every_c: The AI Coach ships with every copy of Pulser.One (gratis forever on the base tier, deeper features on Pro and Enterprise) and streams straight into Pulser.Gym and Pulser.Coach. A DeepTech moat built on our own IP.
contact.page_title: Kontakt — Pulser · Book en demo, anmod om data room
contact.meta_desc: Three ways to reach us: fitnesscenter owners book a 20-minute demo, investors request the data room, medlemmer tell us where they train.
contact.members_tell_us_where_you_train_:
Members

Tell us where you train — we'll reach out to your fitnesscenter.
contact.direct_email_works_too_gopulserf: Direkte e-mail virker også: go@pulser.fit
contact.thanks_message_received_well_rep: Tak — beskeden er modtaget. Vi svarer inden for 24 timer.
contact.name: Navn
for_coaches.meta_desc: Pulser.Coach is the cockpit for personal trainers and trænere — clients, programming, billing and live feedback on one platform, connected to every fitnesscenter and medlem on Pulser.
for_coaches.youre_a_coach_not_a_spreadsh: You're a træner, not a spreadsheet wrangler.
for_coaches.one_cockpit_for_everyone_you: Ét cockpit for alle du træner.
for_coaches.built_on_the_same_movement_e: Bygget på den samme bevægelsesmotor som dine klienter allerede stoler på.
for_coaches.stop_stitching_tools_start_t: Stop med at sy værktøjer sammen. Begynd at træne.
for_coaches.programming_comms_payments_s: Programmering, kommunikation, betalinger, planlægning, video, klientnotater — ingen af dem taler sammen.
for_coaches.chasing_clients_rebuilding_p: Jagte klienter, genopbygge planer, opdatere regneark — tid der aldrig ender på en faktura.
for_coaches.you_prescribe_a_plan_the_cli: Du ordinerer en plan. Klienten træner. Du aner ikke hvad der faktisk skete før næste session.
for_coaches.every_client_every_plan_ever: Every client, every plan, every payment status — one list, one tap. Across every fitnesscenter they visit.
for_coaches.draganddrop_plan_builder_wit: Drag-and-drop planbygger med dine skabeloner, øvelsesbibliotek og periodisering — leveret direkte i deres Pulser.One-app.
for_coaches.when_a_client_trains_you_see: Når en klient træner, ser du reelle sæt, gentagelser, tempo og formscore — drevet af den proprietære bevægelsesmotor i Pulser.One.
for_coaches.automated_nudges_video_revie: Automatiserede nudges, videoanmeldelser og restitutionspåmindelser, med AI'en der viser hvem der faktisk har brug for din opmærksomhed denne uge.
for_coaches.onlineoffline_sessions_packs: Online/offline sessioner, pakker, abonnementer, annulleringer — fakturaer sendes automatisk. Ikke mere jagt.
for_coaches.connect_to_gyms_on_the_pulse: Connect to fitnesscenters on the Pulser network. Your medlemmer can train at partner fitnesscenters; the fitnesscenters can offer you to their medlemmer.
for_coaches.pulsercoach_plugs_directly_i: Pulser.Coach plugs directly into Pulser.One (the medlem app) and Pulser.Gym (the fitnesscenter OS). Whatever your client does in a session — at home, at the fitnesscenter, on the road — flows into your cockpit in real time.
for_coaches.no_manual_logging_no_can_you: Ingen manuel logning. Ingen "kan du sende mig en video?" Ikke mere at flyve i blinde mellem sessioner.
for_coaches.pulsercoach_is_entering_earl: Pulser.Coach is entering early access. Join the waitlist and get priority onboarding plus a seat at the træner advisory board.
for_gyms.page_title: For fitnesscentre — Pulser · Reducér kundefrafald, erstat din stack, tilføj AI
for_gyms.meta_desc: The fitnesscenter operating system that replaces Mindbody, Glofox, a medlem app and your e-commerce — and adds an AI træner that cuts churn by 12pp.
for_gyms.crossgym_access_builtin: Adgang på tværs af centre · Indbygget
for_gyms.software_your_members_actually_: Software your medlemmer actually stay for.
for_gyms.youre_paying_200800month_for_so: You're paying €200–800/mdnth for software that can't talk to itself.
for_gyms.one_platform_everything_your_gy: One platform. Everything your fitnesscenter runs on.
for_gyms.200_members_12pp_less_churn_172: 200 medlemmer. 12pp less churn. €17–20K/year back in your pocket.
for_gyms.see_it_run_on_your_gym_in_20_mi: See it run on your fitnesscenter in 20 minutes.
for_gyms.not_a_saas_with_an_ai_sticker_a: Ikke en SaaS med et AI-klistermærke. En platform med sin egen bevægelsesmotor.
for_gyms.your_members_train_anywhere_you: Your medlemmer train anywhere. You get new traffic in return.
for_gyms.booking_in_one_app_payments_in_: Booking in one app. Payments in another. Member app is white-labelled junk. Nothing shares data. No one sees the full medlem.
for_gyms.your_software_schedules_classes: Din software planlægger hold — den fortæller dig ikke at Anna ikke er dukket op i 11 dage og er 7 dage fra at opsige.
for_gyms.75_of_members_say_theyd_stay_if: 75% of medlemmer say they'd stay if their fitnesscenter offered personalised plans. You can't offer what your software can't do.
for_gyms.contact_attendance_payment_enga: Contact, attendance, payment, engagement and health data — unified per medlem.
for_gyms.group_1on1_and_pt_bookings_with: Group, 1-on-1 and PT bookings with waitlists, træner rosters and auto-reminders.
for_gyms.subscriptions_dropins_packages_: Abonnementer, drop-ins, pakker, mislykket betalingsinddrivelse — EU-klar.
for_gyms.fully_whitelabel_ios_amp_androi: Fully white-label iOS & Android app — medlemmer see your brand, not ours.
for_gyms.launch_a_branded_public_website: Lancér en branded offentlig hjemmeside fra en skabelon på minutter — intet webbureau, alt er forhåndskoblet.
for_gyms.builtin_storefront_for_membersh: Built-in storefront for medlemmerhips, drop-ins, supplements, merch. +€3–6K/year typical uplift at a 200-medlem fitnesscenter.
for_gyms.realtime_form_feedback_via_the_: Real-time form feedback via the medlem's smartphone camera. Preventive health alerts from wearables.
for_gyms.pulsergym_ships_with_the_same_p: Pulser.Gym ships with the same proprietary movement interpretation layer that powers every medlem on Pulser.One — body scan, form scoring, injury-risk and personalised programming. Your fitnesscenter becomes a place where science shows up in every session.
for_gyms.any_pulserone_member_can_check_: Any Pulser.One medlem can check in at any partner fitnesscenter within their tier grade — built into the platform, not a third-party network. Automated settlement, reciprocal revenue-share, no front-desk workarounds. Travelling medlemmer stay loyal; travelling medlemmer from other fitnesscenters become your walk-ins.
for_gyms.incumbents_manage_operations_pu: Etablerede styrer drift. Pulser styrer resultater.
for_gyms.mindbody_500m_revenue_3b_valuat: Mindbody: ~$500M revenue, ~$3B valuation, IPO planned. Still no AI trænering or retention prediction.
for_gyms.a_tailored_walkthrough_of_the_p: A tailored walkthrough of the platform with real data from a fitnesscenter your size. No slides, no sales pitch, no commitment.
for_members.page_title: For Members — Pulser.One · Your AI træner, any fitnesscenter, one app
for_members.meta_desc: An AI træner in your pocket. Personalised plans, real-time form feedback, and preventive health — built into your fitnesscenter's branded app.
for_members.your_ai_coachany_gym_one_app:
Your AI træner.
Any fitnesscenter. One app.
for_members.the_coach_you_wish_you_could: The træner you wish you could afford. In your pocket.
for_members.three_steps_works_with_or_wi: Three steps. Works with or without your fitnesscenter.
for_members.pulser_sees_your_movement_th: Pulser ser din bevægelse. Og hjælper dig med at mestre den.
for_members.travelling_for_work_weekend_: Travelling for work? Weekend in a new city? Moved last month? Your Pulser.One medlemmerhip checks you in at any fitnesscenter on the network within your tier grade — with your plan, your history and your træner right there with you.
for_members.one_slow_rotation_with_your_: One slow rotation with your phone camera. Proportions, posture, composition estimate — without a fitnesscenter visit.
for_members.point_your_phone_at_yourself: Ret din telefon mod dig selv. Billede-for-billede feedback på squats, dødløft, pres — drevet af vores bevægelsesmotor.
for_members.heart_rate_hrv_sleep_steps_f: Puls, HRV, søvn, skridt fra Apple Health, Garmin, Whoop, Oura, Android Health Connect — fodret ind i din plan.
for_members.overtraining_elevated_injury: Overtræning, forhøjet skaderisiko, restitutionsgæld — markeret inden de bliver problemer.
for_members.walk_into_any_partner_gym_in: Walk into any partner fitnesscenter in the network within your tier grade — no day pass, no extra app. Your plan follows you.
for_members.book_a_human_coach_from_the_: Book a human træner from the Pulser.Coach network. They see your form data. Your sessions get sharper.
for_members.free_forever_works_on_its_ow: Gratis forever. Works on its own, or as the medlem app of any fitnesscenter on the Pulser network.
for_members.body_scan_goals_wearable_syn: Kropsscanning, mål, wearable-synkronisering, eventuelle medicinske flags. AI Coach bygger din første plan på minutter.
for_members.home_homegym_travelgym_coach: Home, home-fitnesscenter, travel-fitnesscenter, træner's fitnesscenter. Cross-fitnesscenter access is built in. Your plan adapts to every session.
for_members.tell_us_where_you_train_well: Tell us where you train — we'll reach out to your fitnesscenter. If your fitnesscenter's not on Pulser yet, you can still use Pulser.One for gratis.
for_members.your_coach_if_you_want_one: Your træner, if you want one
home.page_title: Pulser.fit — DeepTech OS til moderne fitness
home.meta_desc: Gyms, medlemmer and trænere on one platform. Powered by our proprietary movement interpretation engine. Pulser.Gym, Pulser.One and Pulser.Coach — in sync.
home.feature_crossgym_access: Funktion · Adgang på tværs af centre
home.whoever_you_show_up_as_pulser_syncs: Uanset hvem du er, synkroniserer Pulser dig.
home.one_app_any_gym_on_the_network: One app. Any fitnesscenter on the network.
home.a_free_ai_coach_in_your_pocket_body: A gratis AI træner in your pocket. Body scan, form feedback, personalised plans — and cross-fitnesscenter access across the network.
home.stop_stitching_six_tools_clients_pr: Stop med at sy seks værktøjer sammen. Klienter, programmering, fakturering og live bevægelsesdata i ét cockpit.
home.pulser_is_a_deeptech_company_everyt: Pulser er en DeepTech-virksomhed. Alt på platformen drives af vores egen bevægelsesfortolkningsmotor — kropsscanning, live formfeedback, skaderisikoscoring, træthedsdetektion og personaliseret periodisering. Ikke et OpenAI-kald. Ikke en wrapper på en andens model. Vores IP, vores data, vores forspring.
home.the_deeper_every_gym_member_and_coa: The deeper every fitnesscenter, medlem and træner uses the platform, the better the model gets. That is the flywheel generic fitness SaaS cannot build.
home.your_pulserone_membership_checks_yo: Your Pulser.One medlemmerhip checks you in at any partner fitnesscenter of the same grade — home, travel or a spontaneous Saturday in a new city.
home.earn_reciprocal_traffic_and_revenue: Earn reciprocal traffic and revenue share on every visit from a Pulser.One medlem, with automated settlement and zero front-desk overhead.
home.your_clients_keep_training_and_you_: Your clients keep training — and you keep seeing their real session data — even when they're not in your home fitnesscenter.
home.crossgym_access_is_built_into_the_p: Cross-fitnesscenter access is built into the Pulser.Gym and Pulser.One product from day one — not a third-party network bolted on top.
home.whether_you_run_a_gym_train_clients: Whether you run a fitnesscenter, train clients or just want to train smarter yourself — Pulser plugs you into one platform, one engine, one network.
home.proprietary_movement_interpretation: Proprietært bevægelsesfortolkningslag — vores kernestack, ikke licenseret.
home.runs_ondevice_where_it_can_fast_pri: Kører on-device hvor den kan — hurtigt, privat, ingen cloud-afhængighed.
home.designed_for_the_2026_european_heal: Designet til 2026 European Health Data Space-forordningen.
home.injuryrisk_models_built_on_publishe: Skaderisikomodeller bygget på publiceret forskning — ikke mavefornemmelser.
home.eu_fitness_software_ai_coaching_tam: EU fitness software + AI trænering TAM
home.of_gymgoers_open_to_aipowered_coach: Of fitnesscenter-goers open to AI-powered trænering
home.european_health_data_space_goes_liv: European Health Data Space går live
home.gen_z_picks_a_gym_based_on_the_memb: Gen Z picks a fitnesscenter based on the medlem app
investors.meta_desc: En informationsbriefing om Pulser — DeepTech-styresystemet til moderne fitness. Marked, voldgrav, traction og køreplan, samlet ét sted.
investors.a_deeptech_operating_system_fo: A DeepTech operating system for a €8.4B fitnesscenter software market.
investors.why_incumbents_cant_copy_this: Hvorfor etablerede ikke kan kopiere dette.
investors.from_poc_to_commercial_pilots_: Fra PoC til kommercielle piloter på 12 måneder.
investors.want_a_deeper_conversation: Vil du have en dybere samtale?
investors.we_are_not_running_a_public_fu: Vi kører ikke en offentlig fundraising-proces på denne side. Hvis du er investor og gerne vil tale, kan du kontakte stifteren direkte på go@pulser.fit.
investors.pose_estimation_biomechanical_: Positionsestimering, biomekanisk modellering, skaderisikoscoring og periodisering kører på vores egen stack — ikke en wrapper på en tredjeparts-API. Bevægelsesfortolkningslaget er produktet; alt andet er distribution.
investors.mindbody_and_glofox_were_built: Mindbody og Glofox blev bygget som planlægningsværktøjer. At tilføje DeepTech-niveau bevægelses-AI kræver et samlet datalag de ikke har. Genopbygning tager år og fremmedgør eksisterende kunder.
investors.camera_wearables_usershared_he: Kamera + wearables + brugerdelte sundhedsdata fodrer en rigere model med hver session på tværs af Pulser.Gym, Pulser.One og Pulser.Coach. Flere data → bedre forudsigelser → højere fastholdelse.
investors.validation_studies_in_biomecha: Valideringsstudier i biomekanikjournaler åbner for Horizon Europe- og EHDS-tilskud — ikke-udvandende finansiering som konkurrenter ikke kan få adgang til.
investors.eu_health_data_regulation_2025: EU-sundhedsdataforordningen (2025/327) træder i kraft fra 2026. Eftermontering af compliance i legacy-systemer er en flerårig omkostning på flere millioner. Vi er bygget EHDS-klar fra dag ét.
investors.every_pulserone_member_can_tra: Every Pulser.One medlem can train at any partner fitnesscenter in the same tier. Reciprocal traffic + automated settlement make the network more valuable with every fitnesscenter that joins.
investors.warsaw_gym_owners_consistent_p: Warsaw fitnesscenter owners. Consistent pain: fragmented tools, zero engagement data, rising churn.
investors.first_letters_of_intent_from_b: Første hensigtserklæringer fra boutique-studier til pilotprogram. Mål: 5 underskrevne LOI'er inden Q2 2026.
investors.eic_accelerator_poland_prize_s: EIC Accelerator + Poland Prize indsendt. Stifter har tidligere vundet LLB 02-242 EU-tilskud.
investors.architecture_amp_prototype_des: Arkitektur & prototypedesign klar. MediaPipe-baseret realtids formanalyse på smartphone.
investors.stage_trl_2_ai_architecture_an: Stage: TRL 2 — AI architecture and prototype concept defined. Target: TRL 4–5 (lab / fitnesscenter-validated prototype) within 12 months.
investors.this_page_is_a_public_overview: Denne side er et offentligt overblik. Dybere materialer — teknisk arkitektur, finansiel model, cap table, LOI'er og tilskudsansøgninger — deles én-til-én under NDA med investorer vi er i aktiv samtale med.
investors.61_of_gym_members_already_use_: • 61% of fitnesscenter medlemmer already use AI-driven fitness tools (ABC Fitness 2025)
investors.47_of_new_gym_joins_are_gen_z_: • 47% of new fitnesscenter joins are Gen Z — digital-native, AI-expectant
platform.meta_desc: Pulser-platformen: Pulser.Gym, Pulser.One og Pulser.Coach, alt drevet af vores proprietære DeepTech bevægelsesfortolkningsmotor.
platform.why_one_platform_beats_a_stack: Hvorfor én platform slår en stack
platform.member_crm_scheduling_billing_b: Member CRM, scheduling, billing, branded app, e-commerce and the AI that keeps medlemmer subscribed.
platform.body_scan_live_form_feedback_pe: Body scan, live form feedback, personalised plans, injury-risk score and cross-fitnesscenter access — with AI Coach built in.
platform.client_roster_programming_studi: Client roster, programming studio, live session data, billing and a fitnesscenter-network marketplace — one cockpit.
platform.pulser_is_a_deeptech_company_ou: Pulser er en DeepTech-virksomhed. Vores bevægelsesfortolkningsmotor er IP vi ejer — bygget fra fagfællebedømt biomekanisk forskning og trænet på reelle sessionsdata fra platformen. Den kører on-device hvor muligt, i skyen hvor den skal skalere.
platform.every_tap_on_the_platform_feeds: Every tap on the platform feeds back into the engine. The medlem gets better cues. The træner gets a clearer picture. The fitnesscenter gets lower churn. The moat compounds.
platform.body_scan_posture_composition_l: Kropsscanning, holdning, sammensætning, live form. Ét telefonkamera, én proprietær model.
platform.rep_counting_tempo_rom_bar_path: Gentagelsestælling, tempo, ROM, stangbane, risikomodellering — baseret på publiceret forskning.
platform.hrv_sleep_activity_apple_health: HRV, søvn, aktivitet — Apple Health, Garmin, Whoop, Oura, Android Health Connect.
platform.built_into_pulserone_plans_aler: Indbygget i Pulser.One. Planer, alarmer og nudges genereret fra dine egne data, ikke dit feed.
platform.gym_member_and_coach_all_read_f: Gym, medlem and træner all read from the same source. No CSV exports. No Zapier glue.
platform.every_gym_member_and_coach_on_p: Every fitnesscenter, medlem and træner on Pulser makes every other part more valuable. Cross-fitnesscenter access is built in.
platform.proprietary_movement_engine_is_: Proprietær bevægelsesmotor er vores kerne-IP — ikke en model fra tredjepart som enhver konkurrent også kan kalde.
platform.designed_for_the_european_healt: Designet til European Health Data Space fra dag ét — portabelt, med samtykke, compliant.
pricing.page_title: Priser — Pulser · Pulser.Gym, Pulser.One og Pulser.Coach-niveauer
pricing.meta_desc: Three products, clear tiers. Pulser.One is gratis for medlemmer. Pulser.Gym starts gratis and unlocks the AI træner on Pro. Pulser.Coach priced per træner.
pricing.free_for_members_fair_for_gyms_a: Gratis for medlemmer. Fair for fitnesscenters and trænere.
pricing.the_ai_coach_in_your_pocket: The AI træner, in your pocket.
pricing.run_your_gym_on_one_platform: Run your fitnesscenter on one platform.
pricing.one_cockpit_instead_of_six_tabs: Ét cockpit i stedet for seks faner.
pricing.is_pulserone_really_free_for_mem: Is Pulser.One really gratis for medlemmer forever?
pricing.can_i_import_my_existing_member_: Can I import my existing medlem data?
pricing.do_members_or_coaches_need_speci: Do medlemmer or trænere need special hardware?
pricing.how_does_the_crossgym_network_wo: How does the cross-fitnesscenter network work commercially?
pricing.how_does_ehds_compliance_affect_: How does EHDS compliance affect me as a fitnesscenter?
pricing.everything_a_member_needs_to_sta: Everything a medlem needs to start training better. Gratis for every Pulser medlem, full stop.
pricing.for_members_who_want_deeper_insi: For medlemmer who want deeper insight and cross-fitnesscenter access. Optional — the base app stays gratis.
pricing.replace_your_scheduling_tool_tod: Erstat dit planlægningsværktøj i dag. Solotrænere og nye studier.
pricing.full_management_platform_ai_coac: Full management platform, AI Coach signals and a fully branded medlem app. For studios, clubs and chains of any type.
pricing.multilocation_chains_franchises_: Multi-location chains, franchises and premium clubs. The base fee covers the platform and your first location; each additional fitnesscenter is €149/md. Custom SLA, full API, co-branded portal.
pricing.for_independent_coaches_running_: For independent trænere running their own book of clients.
pricing.full_deeptech_cockpit_with_live_: Fuldt DeepTech-cockpit med live formfeedback, biomekaniske indsigter og AI-copilot.
pricing.for_coaching_collectives_pt_team: For trænering collectives, PT teams inside fitnesscenters and franchises. The base includes the team cockpit and your first 3 træner seats; each additional træner is €49/md.
pricing.yes_the_base_tier_is_free_foreve: Yes. The base tier is gratis forever. Only Premium (€9.99/md) adds cross-fitnesscenter access, deep biomechanics reports and preventive health alerts — the core AI træner is gratis.
pricing.enterprise_gyms_pay_299mo_for_th: Enterprise fitnesscenters pay €299/md for the platform (first location included) plus €149/md per additional fitnesscenter. Coach teams pay €149/md (first 3 seats included) plus €49/md per additional træner. You only pay for what you actually run.
pricing.yes_we_support_csv_import_and_bu: Yes. We support CSV import and build custom migration scripts for Mindbody, Glofox and Virtuafitnesscenter during onboarding.
pricing.no_form_analysis_runs_on_any_mod: Nej. Formanalyse kører på ethvert moderne smartphonekamera. Wearable-integration er valgfri men anbefalet.
pricing.each_pulserone_plus_visit_to_a_p: Each Pulser.One Plus visit to a partner fitnesscenter triggers automated settlement between fitnesscenters based on tier grade. No front-desk friction, no manual reconciliation.
pricing.ehds_becomes_mandatory_for_eu_he: EHDS bliver obligatorisk for EU-sundhedsdatahåndteringsplatforme fra 2026. At køre på Pulser betyder at du er compliant som standard.
pricing.gym_pro_has_a_onetime_onboarding: Gym Pro har et engangs-onboardinggebyr dækket af din første måneds besparelse. Enterprise inkluderer skræddersyet onboarding i kontrakten.
pricing.book_a_20minute_call_well_map_yo: Book et 20-minutters opkald. Vi kortlægger din arbejdsgang til den rette kombination af Pulser.Gym, Pulser.One og Pulser.Coach.
pricing.wearable_sync_apple_watch_garmin: ✓ Wearable-synkronisering (Apple Watch, Garmin, Whoop, Oura)
pricing.crossgym_access_any_partner_gym_: ✓ Cross-fitnesscenter access (any partner fitnesscenter, same tier)
pricing.full_whitelabel_site_app_amp_the: ✓ Fuld white-label side, app & temaer
pricing.access_any_partner_gym_in_the_ne: ✓ Access any partner fitnesscenter in the network
pulser_coach.meta_desc: Pulser.Coach er den tredje søjle i Pulser-platformen: et fuldt styresystem for personlige trænere, drevet af vores proprietære DeepTech-bevægelsesmotor.
pulser_coach.every_client_every_plan_zer: Hver klient. Hver plan. /dev/null kaos.
pulser_coach.join_the_first_cohort_of_pu: Tilmeld dig den første kohorte af Pulser.Coach.
pulser_coach.every_client_profile_with_t: Hver klientprofil med træningshistorik, mål, begrænsninger og live planstatus.
pulser_coach.draganddrop_plan_builder_wi: Drag-and-drop planbygger med skabeloner, periodisering og et øvelsesbibliotek — synkroniseret til Pulser.One.
pulser_coach.the_deeptech_movement_engin: DeepTech-bevægelsesmotoren i Pulser.One scorer form i realtid — du ser det i dit cockpit.
pulser_coach.scheduled_nudges_video_repl: Planlagte nudges, videosvar, asynkrone talebeskeder. AI prioriterer hvem der har mest brug for dig denne uge.
pulser_coach.sessions_packs_subscription: Sessioner, pakker, abonnementer, annulleringer, EU-klare betalinger. Fakturaer sendes automatisk.
pulser_coach.host_sessions_at_any_gym_on: Host sessions at any fitnesscenter on the Pulser network. Get discovered by medlemmer browsing for a træner.
pulser_coach.the_same_proprietary_moveme: The same proprietary movement interpretation layer your clients use in Pulser.One streams into your cockpit — form score, tempo, ROM, fatigue markers. That's a DeepTech moat no generic træner-app can copy.
pulser_coach.other_coach_tools_are_isola: Other træner tools are isolated. Pulser.Coach is part of a platform with fitnesscenters and medlemmer already on it — so the people you need to reach are already here.
pulser_coach.designed_to_meet_the_2026_e: Designet til at opfylde 2026 European Health Data Space-reglerne fra dag ét. Dine klienters data forbliver portabelt, med samtykke og compliant.
pulser_coach.replaces_scheduling_payment: Replaces scheduling, payments, programming, video trænering, client CRM and analytics. Starts at træner-friendly pricing, not SaaS-bundle pricing.
pulser_coach.pulsercoach_is_in_guided_ea: Pulser.Coach er i guidet tidlig adgang. Ansøg om den første kohorte — prioriteret onboarding, rabatteret pris, direkte linje til produktteamet.
pulser_gym.meta_desc: Pulser.Gym replaces Mindbody, Glofox, your medlem app and your e-commerce platform with one unified fitnesscenter OS — powered by a proprietary DeepTech movement engine.
pulser_gym.run_your_gym_on_one_platform: Run your fitnesscenter on one platform.
pulser_gym.one_workflow_one_invoice_one_: Én arbejdsgang. Én faktura. Én kilde til sandhed.
pulser_gym.your_website_your_store_your_: Din hjemmeside, din butik, din app — alt genereret fra én admin.
pulser_gym.start_free_unlock_the_ai_coac: Start gratis. Unlock the AI træner when you're ready.
pulser_gym.a_proprietary_movement_engine: A proprietary movement engine, inside your fitnesscenter OS.
pulser_gym.one_membership_any_gym_in_the: One medlemmerhip. Any fitnesscenter in the network.
pulser_gym.profile_attendance_payments_e: Profile, attendance, payments, engagement, communication timeline — per medlem, in one place.
pulser_gym.classes_pt_coach_rosters_wait: Classes, PT, træner rosters, waitlists, capacity, reminders — drag-and-drop calendar, mobile-first.
pulser_gym.subscriptions_dropins_package: Abonnementer, drop-ins, pakker, rykkere, EU SEPA + kort. Ingen tredjeparts gateway-lock-in.
pulser_gym.your_logo_your_colours_your_v: Dit logo, dine farver, din stemme. iOS og Android, App Store og Play Store.
pulser_gym.ship_a_fully_branded_public_w: Lancér en fuldt brandet offentlig hjemmeside på minutter — vælg en skabelon, indsæt dit indhold, gå live på dit eget domæne.
pulser_gym.sell_memberships_dropins_supp: Sell medlemmerhips, drop-ins, supplements, merch, digital products — one checkout, medlem pricing, in-app purchase.
pulser_gym.members_in_the_pulserone_app_: Members in the Pulser.One app can train at any partner fitnesscenter of the same grade while travelling — revenue-share and reciprocal access, built in.
pulser_gym.pulsergym_ships_with_the_same: Pulser.Gym ships with the same proprietary movement interpretation layer that powers the Pulser.One medlem app — real-time body scan, form feedback, injury-risk scoring and personalised programming. Not a wrapper on someone else's model. Our own IP.
pulser_gym.any_pulserone_member_can_chec: Any Pulser.One medlem can check in at any partner fitnesscenter within their tier grade — business trips, weekends away, moving cities. You get reciprocal traffic, automated settlement and zero front-desk friction.
pulser_gym.pulsergym_ships_with_a_whitel: Pulser.Gym ships with a white-label site builder. Pick a template, upload your logo, set your colours and domain — and Pulser publishes a branded public website and e-commerce store wired straight into your scheduling, medlemmerhips, payments and medlem app. No web agency. No Stripe-and-Shopify glue. No separate CMS to maintain.
pulser_gym.curated_templates_for_boutiqu: Curated templates for boutique fitnesscenters, chains, yoga, combat sports, CrossFit, climbing walls, padel clubs, sports centres. Production-ready, SEO-clean, multilingual.
pulser_gym.class_schedules_membership_si: Class schedules, medlemmerhip sign-up, drop-in booking, træner profiles, trial offers, contact forms, Apple/Google Pay, VAT, invoices, GDPR/EHDS. All live on day one.
pulser_gym.custom_domain_ssl_your_logo_y: Custom domain, SSL, your logo, your colours, your copy. The medlem never sees the word "Pulser" unless you want them to.
pulser_gym.the_website_the_store_the_mem: The website, the store, the medlem app and the back office are one system, not four. A lead who lands on your home page becomes a paying medlem without ever leaving your brand, and the data lands cleanly in one CRM from the first click to the first check-in.
pulser_gym.launch_a_new_location_seasona: Lancér en ny lokation, sæsonkampagne eller nichetilbud på en dag, ikke et kvartal.
pulser_gym.pulsergyms_starter_tier_is_fr: Pulser.Gym's Starter tier is gratis — replace your scheduling tool today. Upgrade to Pro for the AI træner, branded app and cross-fitnesscenter network.
pulser_gym.scheduling_amp_bookings_synce: • Planlægning & bookinger synkroniseret live med Pulser.Gym
pulser_gym.emailsms_via_your_pulser_inbo: • E-mail/SMS via din Pulser-indbakke + automatiserede flows
pulser_gym.4_members_at_high_churn_risk_: 4 medlemmer at high churn risk this week — scripted outreach ready to send
pulser_one.meta_desc: Pulser.One is the medlem app of the Pulser platform — training, AI form feedback, cross-fitnesscenter access and your built-in AI Coach, powered by our proprietary DeepTech movement engine.
pulser_one.your_gym_your_coach_your_body: Your fitnesscenter. Your træner. Your body. One app.
pulser_one.everything_your_coach_would_c: Everything your træner would charge for — built in.
pulser_one.wherever_you_train_pulserone_: Uanset hvor du træner, træner Pulser.One med dig.
pulser_one.travelling_moving_just_curiou: Travelling? Moving? Just curious? Every Pulser.One medlem can check in at any fitnesscenter on the Pulser network within their tier grade — no extra apps, no surprise day-passes. Your plan, your træner and your history come with you.
pulser_one.built_from_scratch_with_ai_in: Bygget fra bunden med AI i kernen, ikke påboltet som en marketingslogans.
pulser_one.mediapipe_tracks_33_body_keyp: MediaPipe sporer 33 kropsreferencepunkter ved 30fps — ingen cloud, ingen forsinkelse. Reelle ledvinkler, bilateral symmetri, formscore pr. gentagelse.
pulser_one.rotate_once_get_body_shape_fr: Rotér én gang. Få kropsform, kropsramme, sammensætningsestimat, holdningsflags og en træningsplan bygget til dine faktiske proportioner.
pulser_one.ai_analyses_joint_biomechanic: AI analyserer ledbiomekanik, bevægelsesasymmetri og Health Connect-data (HRV, søvn, hvilepuls) for at forudsige skaderisiko før det sker — en 0–100 score med zoneopdeling og personaliserede forebyggelsessignaler.
pulser_one.reads_fitbit_samsung_health_g: Læser Fitbit, Samsung Health, Garmin, Pixel Watch — alt gennem én API. 500+ tilsluttede enheder fodrer skaderisikomodellen automatisk.
pulser_one.your_workout_plan_updates_bas: Din træningsplan opdateres baseret på din kropsscanning, bevægelseshistorik og Health Connect-data. Ingen spørgeskema-gætterier.
pulser_one.perexercise_form_trend_joint_: Formtrend pr. øvelse, ledpræcisionshistorik, personlige rekorder. Se tydeligt at du faktisk bliver bedre.
pulser_one.barbells_cables_machines_and_: Vægtstænger, kabeltræk, maskiner og kardio. Progressiv overbelastning sporet pr. øvelse. Kamera-AI fungerer fra din placerede telefon i enhver vinkel.
pulser_one.bodyweight_mastery_from_begin: Kropsvægtmesterskab — fra begynderprogressioner til avancerede færdigheder. AI sporer ledstilling, spænding og tempo ved hver gentagelse.
pulser_one.ai_tracks_depth_alignment_and: AI sporer dybde, justering og balance i realtid. Stilling-for-stilling feedback, hold-timere og et dagligt mobilitetsprogram bygget omkring din skaderisikoscore.
pulser_one.bodyweight_resistance_bands_d: Kropsvægt, elastikker, håndvægte eller intet udstyr. Fulde programmer bygget omkring præcis det du ejer — ikke det du ville ønske du havde.
pulser_one.park_bars_stairs_sprints_and_: Udendørs barre, trapper, sprints og udendørskredsløb. GPS- og kardiodata fra Health Connect beriger hver session.
pulser_one.fightcamp_conditioning_sports: Fight-camp conditioning, sportsspecifik styrke- og power-træning. Skaderisikomotor afstemt til højbelastning.
pulser_one.running_cycling_swimming_and_: Løb, cykling, svømning og roning — sporet via Health Connect. HRV + belastningsmonitorering fødes automatisk ind i din skaderisikoscore.
pulser_one.returnfrominjury_progressions: Tilbagevenden-fra-skade progressioner, fysioterapi-niveau mobilitetsprotokoller og belastningsstyring. Skaderisikoscoren driver automatisk hver beslutning.
pulser_one.the_free_tier_is_genuinely_us: The gratis tier is genuinely useful — not a crippled trial.
pulser_one.everything_you_need_to_get_st: Alt hvad du behøver for at komme i gang. Ingen prøveperiode.
pulser_one.billed_monthly_cancel_anytime: Faktureres månedligt. Opsig når som helst med 2 tryk.
pulser_one.prices_shown_in_local_currenc: Priser vist i lokal valuta hvor tilgængeligt. Moms kan forekomme.
